title: Update CLI_REFERENCE and CONFIGURATION for realtime
description:
## Scope
- Add realtime and overlay config schema, defaults, and examples to CONFIGURATION.md.
- Add new gossip and overlay CLI commands and flags to CLI_REFERENCE.md.
- Document discovery precedence as explicit policy exception.

## Definition of Done
- CLI_REFERENCE.md and CONFIGURATION.md reflect the new CLI and config behavior in both runtimes.
creator: ryan.porter
